query: Monetizing account sharing before a broad price increase A subscription service has improved engagement but widespread account sharing limits paid conversion. Management can first introduce a paid-sharing mechanism, raise the headline subscription price immediately, or do both. Customer trust and churn sensitivity vary materially across markets. Which monetization sequence should the CFO recommend, and how should verified value and customer impact constrain it?
